name: forge
description: Skills for the Amigo forge CLI

interface.shortDescription: Build, validate, sync, and simulate Amigo agents with forge.
interface.longDescription: Skills for driving the Amigo forge CLI to design, build, validate, deploy, and simulation-test Amigo agents on the Platform.
defaultPrompt: Validate my forge entity JSON before a platform push.
Build an Amigo agent and service with forge.
Run regression simulations before promoting a version-set.
